strongdm.name: StrongDM
strongdm.short_description: Zero Trust Privileged Access Management platform providing runtime access control and session visibility across infrastructure and cloud resources.

features.description: Adaptive access controls with full session visibility and no standing privileges.
features.title: Runtime access management

features.description: Continuously enforces authorization across connected resources.
features.title: Identity firewall

features.description: Supports Kubernetes, databases, network devices, cloud services, and servers under one access model.
features.title: Cross-stack coverage

features.description: Real-time visibility and control over user actions during active sessions.
features.title: Live session control

features.description: Removes standing credentials to reduce theft and lateral-movement risk.
features.title: Credential elimination

features.description: Supports NIST 800-53, FedRAMP, HIPAA, SOC 2, PCI DSS 4.0, and ISO 27001.
features.title: Compliance framework support

pros: Single SKU, per-user pricing model with all features included
No separate charges by protocol, resource type, or usage
Broad resource coverage across databases, Kubernetes, cloud, and servers
Backed by Delinea following its acquisition of StrongDM
cons: No public pricing figures; requires a sales conversation or demo
Recent acquisition by Delinea may bring product or roadmap changes
Founding year and headquarters are not published on the site

faqs.answer: StrongDM is a Zero Trust Privileged Access Management platform offering runtime access control, session visibility, and elimination of standing privileges.
faqs.question: What is StrongDM?

faqs.answer: No, StrongDM uses a single SKU, per-user pricing model with all features included, but exact prices require contacting sales.
faqs.question: Is StrongDM pricing public?

faqs.answer: StrongDM was recently acquired by Delinea to expand capabilities around agentic AI and context-aware authorization.
faqs.question: Who owns StrongDM?

faqs.answer: StrongDM supports NIST 800-53, FedRAMP, HIPAA, SOC 2, PCI DSS 4.0, and ISO 27001, among other standards.
faqs.question: What compliance frameworks does StrongDM support?

snyk.name: Snyk

features.description: Static analysis that finds security vulnerabilities in application source code.

features.description: Scans open source dependencies for known vulnerabilities and license risk.

features.description: Scans container images for vulnerable base images and packages.

features.description: Checks infrastructure-as-code configurations for misconfigurations.
features.title: Snyk IaC

features.description: Integrates with IDEs, source code managers, and CI/CD pipelines including AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
features.title: IDE and CI/CD integrations

pros: Free tier available with no credit card required
Covers code, dependencies, containers, and IaC from one platform
Integrates directly into developer IDEs and CI/CD workflows
Supports regional data hosting (US, EU, AU)
cons: Free plan is capped at 5 projects and limited monthly test counts
Enterprise-level features (custom rules, full SDLC automation) require the top-tier or custom-priced Enterprise plan
Per-developer pricing can scale up quickly for larger teams

faqs.answer: Yes, Snyk offers a Free tier for up to 5 projects with no credit card required.

faqs.answer: The Team plan starts at $25/month per contributing developer, billed monthly.
faqs.question: What does the Team plan cost?

faqs.answer: Yes, in addition to code and open source dependency scanning, Snyk offers Snyk Container and Snyk IaC products.
faqs.question: Does Snyk scan containers and infrastructure code?

faqs.answer: Yes, Snyk integrates with AI coding assistants including Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
faqs.question: Can Snyk integrate with AI coding tools?
